$schema_note: Declarative asset list for tools/asset_gen/generate.py. subject fragments are style-neutral; the active style.json supplies style_prefix/style_suffix and optional per-category overrides. An asset's optional 'references' lists extra image paths (repo-root-relative) appended after the style anchors when calling remix() -- used to chain each crew role's approved idle_s sprite in as the character-design reference for its other poses.
